name: SA Pty Ltd CoA categorisation — production-faithful eval set
description: Twenty-five labelled bank transactions designed to exercise the prompt's SA-specific reasoning rules: director loan vs share capital, Shell forecourts as fuel not travel, Section 18A donations as NON-VAT, SARS penalties as 6955 not 6990, municipal rates as VAT-exempt, etc. Each entry has a single primary expected code plus an acceptable-alternatives list for cases where multiple codes are defensibly correct.

entries.rationale: Routine rent payment — single canonical answer.
Internet connectivity — Internet & Telephone.
Eskom = electricity utility.

transaction.description: EFT CR STELLENBOSCH SPECIALTY FOODS INV-0001

entries.rationale: Customer payment for an invoice — Sales Revenue family. Primary is Product Sales since it's a coffee roaster.
Bank service fee — Bank Charges & Fees, VAT-exempt per SA rules.

transaction.description: TRANSFER FROM A VAN HEERDEN — ADDITIONAL CAPITAL

entries.rationale: Director funds into the business = Shareholder's Loan, NOT Share Capital. The prompt explicitly addresses this — picking 3100 here would mean the agent misread an SA Pty Ltd convention.
Shell forecourt = vehicle fuel. Prompt says prefer 6920 over generic 6900 (Travel & Entertainment).
Vehicle tracker subscription — Motor Vehicle Expenses, not Software.
Settling employee tax liability — debits PAYE Payable, the liability account being cleared.
VAT settlement — clears VAT Output liability.
Accounting software — Software & Subscriptions per prompt example list.
Insurance premium — VAT-exempt per SA rules.
Conference attendance — could be Travel & Entertainment (6900) for the hotel/venue OR Training & Development (6160) for the conference itself. Both defensible.
SARS penalty — Penalties & Fines, NON-VAT, non-deductible per Section 23(o). Prompt explicitly lists this pattern.
Section 18A donation — Donations account, NON-VAT, deduction limited to 10% of taxable income.
Equipment repair — Repairs & Maintenance.

transaction.description: DISCOVERY HEALTH — STAFF MEDICAL AID MARCH

entries.rationale: Discovery Health = medical aid — Employee Benefits & Medical Aid per prompt patterns.

transaction.description: CITY OF GEORGE — MUNICIPAL RATES Q1

entries.rationale: Municipal rates — 6340 (Rates), VAT-exempt. Prompt explicitly flags the 'city of'/'council' keyword pattern.
PNet = recruitment platform — Recruitment Costs per prompt pattern.
PostNet courier — Courier & Postage. Prompt says prefer 6940 over 5500 for non-COGS courier.
Anthropic = AI software service — Software & Subscriptions per prompt example list.
Gross salaries payment — Gross Salaries account.
Raw coffee inventory purchase — could go to Direct Materials (5300) as expense or Raw Materials (1131) as capitalised inventory. Both defensible without journal context.

transaction.description: EFT CR YOCO — CARD MACHINE SETTLEMENT

entries.rationale: Yoco settlement = customer card payment landing — Sales Revenue. Prompt explicitly notes Yoco fees should NOT auto-go to bank charges.
Cleaning services — Cleaning & Hygiene per prompt pattern.
